Phillip J Fry from Futurama Joins Mario Kart 8 using his model from Fortnite!
he has some issues on bikes, specifically with his waist, but I will do my best to fix it. i just wanted to put it out first

mods.name: Lightning Mqueen Joins Mario Kart 8! - A Mod for Mario Kart 8.
mods.author: Teos20073
mods.description:
This is a mod that replaces the Cat Cruiser with Cars 2 Lightning McQueen. 

It also replaces the standard tires with his iconic Lightyear™ tires. 

Since it looks weird having a character be inside of him i have also made Waluigi invisible so that it looks good, this also gives him a voice. This mod also includes all UI files.
